name: Apple iPhone 15
description: The Apple iPhone 15 features a powerful A16 Bionic chip, advanced dual-camera system, and a sleek aluminum design with Dynamic Island.

description: Premium wireless noise-canceling headphones with crystal-clear sound quality, long battery life, and exceptional comfort.

name: Dell XPS 13 Laptop

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: A smart wearable device with health tracking, fitness monitoring, and seamless integration with Apple devices.
